nodes.name: JIRA Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives JIRA webhook events. Register this URL in JIRA under Project Settings → Webhooks. Subscribe to: jira:issue_updated, jira:issue_created, comment_created.

nodes.name: Has PR Number?
nodes.notes: Only proceed if a GitHub PR number was found in the JIRA issue description. If not, log and stop.

nodes.name: Route by JIRA Status
nodes.notes: Routes execution based on the new JIRA status. Add additional cases as your workflow evolves.

nodes.name: GitHub: Add 'in-review' Label
nodes.notes: Adds label 'jira:in-review' to the GitHub PR. Create this label in GitHub first.

nodes.name: Has Head SHA? (Approved)
nodes.notes: headSha must be enriched by the caller — JIRA payloads do not carry Git SHAs. An operator can enrich via a preceding GitHub API call to GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number} if needed. If headSha is empty, skip the commit status POST gracefully.

nodes.name: Has Head SHA? (Rejected)
nodes.notes: headSha must be enriched by the caller — JIRA payloads do not carry Git SHAs. An operator can enrich via a preceding GitHub API call to GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number} if needed. If headSha is empty, skip the commit status POST gracefully.

nodes.name: GitHub: Set Status Check (Approved)
nodes.notes: headSha must be enriched by the caller — JIRA payloads do not carry Git SHAs. An operator can enrich via a preceding GitHub API call to GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number} if needed.

nodes.name: GitHub: Set Status Check (Rejected)
nodes.notes: headSha must be enriched by the caller — JIRA payloads do not carry Git SHAs. An operator can enrich via a preceding GitHub API call to GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number} if needed.
